refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs for each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows targeted design and verification of each phase's contribution to overall cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time under representative duty cycles and site conditions; verify each sub-FR's timing contribution through simulation and field testing.

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic system response and control algorithms for load phase
Implement efficient path planning and vehicle dynamics control for travel phase
Enhance dumping mechanism speed and reliability for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic system response and control algorithms for load phase

potential_sources: Interdependence between load and travel phases timing
Control algorithm adjustments affecting multiple phases
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase, but control algorithms must be coordinated to avoid negative cross-phase effects.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate modeling of hydraulic and vehicle dynamics
Risk of control algorithm complexity increasing system integration difficulty
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP to manage phase transitions and timing coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load phase hydraulic actuation and control

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load phase status and performance data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive load phase commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to cross-phase coordination logic residing here.
Primary containment of load phase DP; low diffusion risk.
Minimal involvement in load phase control.
Safety monitoring only; no direct load phase control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Load phase control DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership of hydraulic actuation.
containment_risks: Potential cross-module coordination complexity with NGHE Solution for cycle time optimization
Interface latency or reliability issues on Telemetry and Tasking links
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define explicit coordination interface and protocols between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to manage cross-phase timing.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time into manageable sub-FRs; selected DP logically addresses load phase optimization with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Cross-phase coordination logic diffusion into NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module effectively contains load phase DP with minimal diffusion; interfaces are well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at Vehicle module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of load phase DP to Vehicle IM; interfaces to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation are explicit.

recommended_revisions: Add coordination DP and IM boundary to handle phase transitions and timing coupling explicitly.
Strengthen interface definitions and protocols between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, the identified coupling and diffusion risks around phase coordination require revisiting the FR and DP definitions to explicitly capture coordination requirements.
next_level_sub_frs: Coordinate phase transitions to optimize overall cycle time

revise.why: To explicitly include coordination FR that addresses timing coupling and phase transitions, enabling clearer DP and IM definitions.

assumptions: Cycle time can be decomposed by phase
Vehicle module can contain load phase DP effectively
open_risks: Interface latency impacting cycle time performance
evidence_needed: Field data on phase timing dependencies
Latency and reliability metrics of Telemetry and Tasking interfaces
